message:
fix(home): exclude draft writing items from the home page feature strip

`writingHighlights.slice(0, 6)` was returning draft articles into the
"Featured Writing" section on the home page, which defeated the
`draft: true` gate that the rest of the site already respects (index
page, RSS, structured data).

Filter draft items before slicing so the feature strip shows the six
most recent published pieces and nothing flagged `draft: true`.

Continue to skip `.beads/.write.lock` (ephemeral).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
